name: Tex-Mex Skillet Pasta Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 28-ounce can plum tomatoes, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add spaghetti and cook according to package directions. Drain in a colander.
2. While pasta cooks, mix salsa ingredients in a medium bowl until blended. Let stand at room temperature for flavors to develop.
3. Heat 1 teaspoon of oil in an ovenproof nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until golden and tender, about 8 minutes. Scrape into a large bowl, add eggs and beat with a fork or whisk until blended. Stir in spaghetti, cilantro, salt, and pepper.
4. Turn off the heat under the skillet and wipe it clean. Add remaining oil and heat. Pour in egg mixture, cover, and cook over medium-low heat for 8 minutes or until the bottom is light golden and only the top remains uncooked.
5. Loosen edges with a rubber spatula. Slide "pie" onto a serving plate, cut into wedges, and serve with the salsa.
